name: @harness/config-store
description: ISSUE-010 — the config persistence backbone (C7 FR-7.LOG.008 / NFR-CMP.006/007 / NFR-SEC.003). config_values key-prefix RLS (migration 0003), the secret_manifest presence contract (presence + last_rotated only, never a value — the boot gate reads required-missing), the config_audit_log read + all-or-fail export gated by PERM-compliance.download_records, the retention job (never prunes a floor-window row, logs the run), the redaction-tombstone entry point on config_audit_log.actor_id, and the no-secret-in-log invariant. Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL — NOT run live (the trigger/RLS live proof is the ISSUE-010 capstone at the Stage-2 checkpoint).
